title: eriochloa fatmensis
intro: Eriochloa fatmensis, also known as Fat's needle grass, is a perennial grass native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eriochloa fatmensis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Eriochloa fatmensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
